title: PressMove Object How to Use
description:
PressMove Object How to Use

PressMove Object

How to use

1. Specify the basic information. (Name, Description, AutoStepID, StepID, AbortSeqOnFail property)

2. Specify the I/O operation of when starting this object. (IOPreprocEnabled, IOPreprocOutputBit, IOPreprocOutputStatus property)

3. Specify the trajectory, speed and acceleration of move motion. (MotionTrajectory, AccelS, AccelR, SpeedS, SpeedR, DestType, DestPoint, MidPoint, RelativeOrient, RelativeRobotLocal, DestRelativeX, ..., DestRelativeW, MidRelativeX, ..., MidRelativeW property)

4. Specify the control mode of each orientation. (Fx_ControlMode, ..., Tz_ControlMode property)

5. Specify the press force and press torque. (Fx_PressForce, ..., Tz_PressForce property)

6. Specify the firmness. (Fx_Firmness, ..., Tz_Firmness property)

7. Specify the end condition about force. (ForceCheckEnabled, ForceCheckMode, PressCheckTolF, PressCheckTolT, FollowCheckTolF, FollowCheckTolT, HoldTimeThresh property)

8. Specify the end condition about position. (PosCheckEnabled, PlaneNumber, PlaneEndCond, PlaneRelativeOrg, PlaneRelativeX, PlaneRelativeY, PlaneRelativeZ, PlaneRelativeOrient, PlaneAxes, PlaneRelativeRobotLocal property)

9. Specify the end condition about I/O. (IOCheckEnabled, IOCheckInputBit, IOCheckInputStatus property)

10. Specify the combination of end condition. (EndCheckOperator property)

11. Specify whether to connect the trajectory and force control of this object and next force guide object. (CFEnabled, CPEnabled property)

12. Adjust parameter by cut and try. Mainly adjust the Firmness of each orientation, SpeedS, SpeedR, AccelS, AccelR property.
